title: Chapter 79
content:
Chapter 79: Buried in the Herd of Capybara Girls

Click.

"..."

"..."

Retory-san emerged from the toilet.

This was awkward.

I had listened up close as she vigorously peed with impressive volume and force.

As a 30-year-old golden retriever dog girl with long blonde hair and droopy ears, she obviously knew I had heard everything.

Her cheeks were slightly flushed, and she kept subtly avoiding eye contact with me.

The way she looked embarrassed and slightly hung her head... was seriously erotic...!

Just as I had no idea what to say to her, she also seemed unable to find the right words.

A brief silence followed.

Then—

Creak.

The sound of a different door opening came from behind us. It looked like Raffilia-san had come out of the back shed.

"Welcome back, Masaharu-san."

"I’m home. Raffilia-san, this is Retory-san."

"Nice to meet you, Retory-san. I’m Raffilia, a priestess of the Lalm faith."

"Nice to meet you. I’m Retory, a Golden Retriever."

Ah, thank goodness. Raffilia-san’s appearance instantly cleared the awkward atmosphere. For now, let’s just never speak of the peeing sounds again.

Still, what a sight.

This was the first meeting between the two biggest-breasted women I’d encountered since coming to this other world.

Raffilia-san’s robes hung down from the absolute peak of her enormous bust, making her look somewhat cylindrical. Retory-san’s one-piece dress also draped from the summit of her massive chest, but her figure had much more pronounced curves. Probably because her clothes were originally made for women.

Both were different, and both were fantastic. I wanted to get sandwiched right between them.

I also wanted to see their big asses walking side by side... but that wish wasn’t going to be granted.

Retory-san never walked in front or beside me—she always followed from behind like a well-trained dog. Come to think of it, even on the way to the church she’d been watching over everyone from the very back.

Seeing two large, swaying asses walking in tandem would have to wait for another opportunity.

Iferaski, the elf, and the four dog girls had been laid down on the pews, so the only one left was the capybara girl.

But this turned out to be an absolute nightmare.

The five of us—me, the two macho guys, Raffilia-san, and Retory-san—tried to carry the capybara girl to the pews, but every time we moved her, the ones we’d already seated would wander off and return to the "Capybara Mountain" in the alley.

What the hell? Did Lucia emit some kind of capybara-attracting pheromone? Or did they just want to return to the herd after being separated?

This was unmanageable.

Oh, right. I should get the kemoloris to help.

"Hey, kemolori."

"Yes?"

"What is it?"

"Did you call?"

"Yeees~"

"...?"

There were way too many replies.

"Kemolori?"

"Yes."

"What is it?"

"I’m kemolori."

"I’m kemolori too."

"No, I’m kemolori."

"No way, I’m kemolori."

"I’m kemolori too!"

"W-wait, what’s going on here?"

"So many kemoloris... hehe... kemoloris are so cute..."

From inside the mountain came Lucia’s melted, blissful laughter.

No way...

"H-hey, Lucia. Are they all convinced they’re named ’kemolori’ because you keep calling them that?"

"They are kemoloris, right?"

"Ah... Lucia, don’t tell me you thought ’kemolori’ was their species name? Kemolori is your name for them. These girls are probably capybaras. Capybara girls."

"...Eh?"

"..."

My bad premonition had been spot on.

Because Lucia kept calling them kemoloris, every single one of them now believed they had been given the name "Kemolori."

"H-hey. Which one of you is the kemolori I met first?"

"Yes! That’s me!"

"No, it’s me! I met you first!"

"I was the first one, wasn’t I?"

"No, I was faster!"

"Why does everyone think they were first...? ...Ah."

From my perspective, I only met one kemolori first, but from the capybara girls’ perspective, they had all met me at the same time in the cell.

This was bad. I couldn’t exactly ask, "Which one of you had your urethra stretched by me~?" when Raffilia-san, Retory-san, and the macho guys were standing right there.

What should I do...?

Oh, right.

"Who was the kemolori that flew in the sky with me today?"

"Yes!"

Finally, I narrowed it down to one...

Wait—!

The moment that kemolori started approaching me—

"What do you mean, flew in the sky?"

"I want to fly too!"

"I want to fly as well!"

"That’s unfair! I want to fly too!"

"Can we fly?"

The capybara girls swarmed toward me all at once. They clung to my knees and pushed. Someone shoved the back of my knee, causing me to buckle and fall. I bounced off a capybara girl’s back and collapsed into the alley, only for more capybara girls to pile on top of me one after another.

"H-hey, stop... mghhh—!"

My mouth was smothered by someone’s belly. How many of them were on me?

I was completely enveloped in animal scent and body heat. This was dangerous... I could totally get addicted to this.

It wasn’t exactly a good smell by any stretch. It was nothing like the sweet scent of fruit or flowers.

It smelled like a dog after a rainy day. Frankly, it stank.

But even though it stank... I wanted to keep smelling it.

Come to think of it, I’d heard that humans have far fewer words to describe sounds and smells compared to sight because those senses aren’t as developed. Yeah, we really don’t have enough vocabulary for smells...!

Was it okay to just call this "stinky"?

It was a stink that didn’t feel unpleasant at all. Damn it. The lack of a proper word for this scent was painful.

For now, I’ll describe it as "thick and savory."

I probably could have pushed the capybara girls off if I tried, but I just couldn’t bring myself to do it.

Their fur was a double attack of coarse and fluffy. The back side was stiff guard hairs, while their bellies were soft and silky. Touching those soft bellies felt amazing. Since they were climbing on top of me while I lay on my back, their plush tummies pressed against my entire body. I stretched my arms out while wrapped in soft flesh, stroking their slightly coarse backs and enjoying the flow of their fur.

"No fair. Masaharu is hogging them all."

Lucia pushed her way through the gap between the capybara girls and lay down beside me.

Huh? I thought she was wearing white clothes earlier, but now she was completely naked.

"Don’t tell me you stripped naked just so you could fully enjoy the capybara girls?"

"Yep."

"I see... I get it. Lucia, it’s no wonder you’re so hooked. This really is addictive."

"Yeah. Capybara girls are so cute... And they smell nice too."

"Ah. Yeah. Don’t go telling other beastmen they smell nice while laughing, okay? You’ll probably scare them."

"Got it..."

"Let’s clear up the misunderstandings little by little. We’re fine with it, and Iferaski and the others will get used to it too."

"Yeah."

"Still... this feels really nice..."

It was warm and comfortable. Maybe I should just sleep right here.

"Masaharu-san, are you okay? We’ll let the dog girls eat first, alright?"

Raffilia-san called out to me.

Right. Dinner.

After flying through the sky, taking tests, and freeing slaves, even I was starving.

There was no way I was letting the two macho guys have all the fun eating with the girls. I was joining in too!

I sat up, extracting myself from the capybara mountain.

Raffilia-san reached out her hand. I grabbed it and finally managed to escape the addictive mountain.

What a dangerous place. It ruins people.
